title: Add agent-focused optimizer discovery CLI and MCP tools

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented agent-focused optimizer discovery kit: compact review packets, evaluation discovery, procedure optimizer summaries, batch promotion packets, compact MCP summaries, and shared-service tests. Validation: optimizer_results_test.py, py_compile for CLI/MCP modules, and real CLI acceptance on Medication Review Pharmacy plus batch scorecard packets.
